list.title: KYC Submissions
list.description: Manage Know Your Customer submissions and compliance reviews.

new.title: New KYC Submission
new.selectTicket: Select a ticket to begin the KYC process.
new.formHint: Complete all the steps below and submit when ready.
new.searchPlaceholder: Search tickets by title, ID or client...
new.noTicketsSearch: No tickets match your search. Try different keywords.
new.noTicketsAvailable: There are no tickets available to start a KYC submission.

entityInfoHint: This information is derived from the linked ticket. Proceed to the next step to add parties.

party.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this party? This action cannot be undone.
party.empty: No parties have been added yet.

ubo.noUbos: No UBOs or shareholders have been added. Go back to the Parties step to add them.
ubo.ownershipExceeds: Total ownership exceeds 100%. Please adjust the ownership percentages.
ubo.ownershipIncomplete: Total ownership does not sum to 100%. Please verify the ownership percentages.

documents.acceptedFormats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, JPEG, PNG

review.submitHint: Once submitted, the KYC will be reviewed by the compliance team.
review.fixErrors: Please fix the errors above before submitting.

warnings.noParties: At least one party is required.
warnings.ownershipNotComplete: UBO/Shareholder ownership does not sum to 100%.
warnings.noDocuments: No supporting documents have been uploaded.
warnings.pepPresent: One or more parties are flagged as Politically Exposed Persons (PEP).
warnings.missingId: One or more parties are missing identification numbers.

risk.title: Risk Assessment
risk.calculateHint: Click "Recalculate" to generate a risk assessment.

rfis.hint: RFIs will appear here when the compliance team requests additional information.

personSearch.title: Search Existing Persons
personSearch.minChars: Type at least 2 characters to search.
personSearch.createHint: You can create a new party manually by closing this dialog.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 255 characters or less.
validation.ownershipRequired: Ownership percentage is required for this role.
validation.atLeastOneParty: At least one party is required.
validation.documentsRequired: At least one document must be uploaded.
